title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Digital Marketing Manager Vacancy at Spencer's Retail - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Join the Spencer's Retail family as a Digital Marketing Manager in Jaipur. We believe in empowering our employees with the tools, training, and environment they need to succeed.

About Spencer's Retail:
Spencer's Retail is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Execute digital marketing campaigns across Google, Meta, and other channels
• Optimize product pages for search visibility and conversion
• Collaborate with logistics partners to ensure timely delivery
• Manage customer reviews, ratings, and return/refund processes
• Manage marketplace relationships with Amazon, Flipkart, and Meesho
• Develop and implement category growth strategies
• Coordinate with vendors and suppliers for inventory management

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Any graduate with relevant experience
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Facebook Ads
• Proficiency in Retention Marketing
• Proficiency in Magento
• Proficiency in Influencer Marketing
• Proficiency in Product Management
• Proficiency in Shopify
• Proficiency in SEO/SEM
• Proficiency in Customer Segmentation

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Referral bonus program
• Life and accident insurance
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual performance appraisal
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Spencer's Retail!
